title: Simple Football
body:
![Simple Football Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e6caa86339ab72f8d75e8255236bed82df6261d.png)

# Adding Football, to Minecraft!
Simple Football adds American Football into Minecraft! Get together with some friends and play some football. This mod is currently "simple" as the name suggests, but does add some neat features (more planned in future!) (Now available in Fabric as well as Forge and NeoForge).
## Features:
- Football
- Throwing
- Catching
- Kicking
- Tackling
- Placeable ball for snapping/kicking
- Goal Posts
- Different colored turf
- Cones
- Endzone Pylons
- Yardage Markers

## Compatibility/Requirements:
Simple Football should be compatible with most mods, and has no requirements/library mods!
However, we do recommend a few mods to make your Football experience better:
- [ParCool!](https://modrinth.com/mod/parcool)
- [Real Camera](https://modrinth.com/mod/real-camera)
- [Camera Overhaul Reforged](https://modrinth.com/mod/camera-overhaul-reforged)
- And any performance mods you would like!

### This mod is in Beta stages and not complete yet.
(Part of Simple Sports mod series.)
